title: Senior Financial Analyst - Niva Bupa South Asia Partners - Immediate Joiners Preferred

jsonLd.title: Senior Financial Analyst - Niva Bupa South Asia Partners - Immediate Joiners Preferred
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Niva Bupa South Asia Partners! We are hiring a Senior Financial Analyst for our Kanpur team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Niva Bupa South Asia Partners:
Niva Bupa South Asia Partners is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Maintain general ledger and ensure accurate bookkeeping
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits
• Conduct due diligence for mergers, acquisitions, and investments

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in Tally
• Proficiency in Forecasting
• Proficiency in Financial Reporting
• Proficiency in VBA
• Proficiency in Python for Finance

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Flexible working hours
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Annual performance appraisal
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Kanpur, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Niva Bupa South Asia Partners!
